system.description:
A Devourer may be host to these more voracious and deadly variety of creatures. A Devourer with Brain Leech Worms does 2d10+6 R damage, and if it inflicts any damage on a squad of Battle-Brothers, the squad suffers one additional point of Cohesion damage.

Upgrades: Tyranid Devourer only.

Note: The Cohesion damage effect must be applied manually by the GM.
